since_last: 55% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.99%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +0.28% · Gold +1.45% · Nasdaq100 +0.35%. 55% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.99%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.99%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: VRT is the standout at +7.72%
cards.body: Leaders: VRT +7.72%, AMAT +7.51%, ARM +6.83%, ASML +6.24%, SMR +6.22%. Laggards: SNAP -4.02%, APP -3.62%, META -3.43%, AI -3.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.23% at $199.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.23% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
